title: Perps are live in Infinex
deployed_facts: Perpetual futures trading is live in Infinex
Perps trade from the same account as spot
There is no separate sub-account, deposit, or transfer required to open a position
Margin and spot balances live in the same portfolio view
The perps venue is integrated at the orderbook level, not as a wrapper
headline: Perps are live.
subhead: Same account as your spot. Same passkey. No sub-account, no transfer.
tier_reason: Perps were the largest structural addition since the account launch. Spot-and-perps in one account collapses the dominant CEX workflow into a single self-custodial surface — a category-shaping moment, not a venue addition.
through_action: to make 'I have to bridge to perps' a sentence that no longer makes sense
